mapper.select: SELECT user_id, email, password, name, phone, role, status, restrict_until, preferred_location, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (email, password, name, phone, role, status, preferred_location, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{role}, 'ACTIVE', #{preferredLocation}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, preferred_location = #{preferredLocation}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, email, password, name, phone, role, status, restrict_until, preferred_location, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET status = #{status}, restrict_until = #{restrictUntil}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
